overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a teal shirt crossing a neon-lit street and walking along an elevated orange walkway in Night City. The scene features futuristic architecture, digital billboards, and a cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant purple and orange neon lighting against a dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with yellow striped crosswalk and neon signage

events.description: futuristic black vehicle drives past in the background behind the crossing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk surrounded by other pedestrians in a dense urban environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking across the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold diagonal yellow and black stripes
large illuminated screen displaying purple and pink advertisement on building facade
red neon signage for eatery visible on right side of street
tall modern light poles with multiple illumination sources lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a wide yellow-striped crosswalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the scene while other pedestrians cross in various directions and a vehicle passes in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk transition with distinctive orange textured pavement and pedestrian infrastructure

events.description: steps off the asphalt crosswalk onto the orange textured pedestrian pavement
slight left turn while following the curve of the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange textured pavement passing a pedestrian signal pole with blue crossing sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in plaid shirt walking ahead in the same direction along the walkway

entered.detail: distinctive orange diamond-plate textured metal walkway surface
tall rust-colored pole with blue illuminated pedestrian crossing sign
silver metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the street crosswalk onto an orange textured pedestrian walkway. They pass a pedestrian signal pole while walking alongside another pedestrian, with the purple billboard now fading into the distance behind them.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated futuristic walkway with massive structural supports and suspended digital displays

events.description: lighting shifts to a warmer tone as character passes under large structural overhangs with yellow accent lights
passing between large suspended digital billboard frames with glowing yellow borders

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway passing massive angular structural supports and digital advertising screens

entered.detail: massive angular orange and black support beams with horizontal yellow lighting accents
large rectangular digital displays suspended between structural elements showing advertisements
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and smoke stacks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated futuristic walkway characterized by massive orange structural supports and suspended digital billboards. The environment opens up to reveal the distant neon-lit city skyline while the character moves through the semi-covered corridor with yellow accent lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling street-level crossing into an elevated, expansive urban corridor. It begins with the character crossing a wide yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a crowd of pedestrians and passing vehicles under the glow of vibrant neon signs. As the character leaves the street, the scene shifts onto an orange textured pedestrian walkway, passing a signal pole while the purple billboards of the intersection fade into the background. The environment then opens up as the camera follows the character along a semi-covered corridor defined by massive orange structural supports and yellow accent lighting. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal the distant, neon-lit city skyline suspended beneath towering digital billboards.
